left-color.desc: Color name for left-side background from the Quasar Color Palette
left-color.desc_cn: Quasar 颜色调色板中左侧背景的颜色名称

right-color.desc: Color name for right-side background from the Quasar Color Palette
right-color.desc_cn: 来自 Quasar 颜色调色板的右侧背景颜色名称

top-color.desc: Color name for top-side background from the Quasar Color Palette
top-color.desc_cn: Quasar 颜色调色板中用于顶部背景的颜色名称

bottom-color.desc: Color name for bottom-side background from the Quasar Color Palette
bottom-color.desc_cn: Quasar 颜色调色板中底部背景的颜色名称

dark.desc: Notify the component that the background is a dark color
dark.desc_cn: 通知组件背景颜色为深色

default.desc: This is where item's sections go; Suggestion: QItemSection
default.desc_cn: 这是项目的部分所在的位置；建议使用：QItemSection

top.desc_cn: 滑动时的顶部侧边内容

bottom.desc_cn: 滑动时底部的侧边内容

left.desc: Emitted when user finished sliding the item to the left

reset.desc: When called, it resets the component to its initial non-slided state
reset.desc_cn: 当调用时，它将组件重置为初始的非滑动状态。

left.desc_cn: 用户将项目向左滑动完成时触发

right.desc: Emitted when user finished sliding the item to the right

reset.desc: When called, it resets the component to its initial non-slided state
reset.desc_cn: 当调用时，它将组件重置为初始的非滑动状��。

right.desc_cn: 用户将项目向右滑动完成时触发

top.desc: Emitted when user finished sliding the item up

reset.desc: When called, it resets the component to its initial non-slided state
reset.desc_cn: 当调用时，它将组件重置为初始的非滑动状态。

top.desc_cn: 用户完成向上滑动项目时触发

bottom.desc: Emitted when user finished sliding the item down

reset.desc: When called, it resets the component to its initial non-slided state
reset.desc_cn: 当调用时，它将组件重置为初始的非滑动状态。

bottom.desc_cn: 用户完成向下滑动项目时触发

slide.desc: Emitted while user is sliding the item to one of the available sides

side.desc: Side to which sliding is taking effect
side.desc_cn: 滑动效果生效的侧边栏

ratio.desc: Ratio of how much of the required slide was performed (0 <= x <= 1)
ratio.desc_cn: 所需幻灯片完成的比例（0 <= x <= 1）

slide.desc_cn: 用户将项目滑动到可用侧面时触发

action.desc: Emitted when user finished sliding the item to either sides

side.desc: Side to which sliding has taken effect
side.desc_cn: 滑动效果生效的侧边栏

reset.desc: When called, it resets the component to its initial non-slided state
reset.desc_cn: 当调用时，它将组件重置为初始的非滑动状态。

action.desc_cn: 当用户完成将项目滑动到两侧时触发

reset.desc: Reset to initial state (not swiped to any side)
reset.desc_cn: 重置为初始状态（未向任何一侧滑动）
